Name: CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark
Description: CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark provides security best practices for AWS environments

Requirements.Description: Maintain detailed documentation of the AWS account

Attributes.Description: Maintain detailed documentation of the AWS account
Attributes.RationaleStatement: Documentation helps with tracking changes to IAM configurations
Attributes.ImpactStatement: Without documentation, changes may not be tracked

Requirements.Description: Ensure IAM password policy requires minimum password length

Attributes.Description: Ensure IAM password policy requires minimum password length of 14 or greater
Attributes.RationaleStatement: Strong passwords reduce the risk of unauthorized access
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if password policy exists and has minimum length 14

Requirements.Description: Ensure MFA is enabled for the root user

Attributes.Description: Ensure MFA is enabled for the root user
Attributes.RationaleStatement: MFA adds extra layer of security
Attributes.ImpactStatement: Root account without MFA is vulnerable to attacks
Attributes.RemediationProcedure: Enable MFA for root account via AWS Console
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if root account has MFA enabled

Requirements.Description: Ensure hardware MFA is enabled for the root user

Attributes.Description: Ensure hardware MFA is enabled for the root user
Attributes.RemediationProcedure: Enable hardware MFA for root account
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if root account has hardware MFA

Requirements.Description: Ensure IAM users have MFA enabled

Attributes.Description: Ensure all IAM users have MFA enabled
Attributes.RationaleStatement: MFA reduces the risk of unauthorized access
Attributes.RemediationProcedure: Enable MFA for all IAM users
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if all IAM users have MFA enabled

Requirements.Description: Keep a minimum of one working MFA-enabled hardware MFA on the account

Attributes.Description: Keep a minimum of one working MFA-enabled hardware MFA on the account
Attributes.RationaleStatement: Hardware MFA ensures access even if virtual MFA is lost
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if hardware MFA is enabled

Attributes.Description: Ensure S3 Block Public Access is enabled at account level
Attributes.RemediationProcedure: Enable S3 Block Public Access at account level
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if S3 Block Public Access is enabled

Requirements.Description: Ensure all S3 buckets have encryption at rest enabled

Attributes.Description: Ensure all S3 buckets have encryption at rest enabled
Attributes.RemediationProcedure: Enable default encryption on S3 buckets
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if S3 buckets have encryption enabled

Requirements.Description: Ensure S3 buckets have versioning enabled

Attributes.Description: Ensure S3 buckets have versioning enabled
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if S3 buckets have versioning enabled

Requirements.Description: Ensure EBS volumes have encryption enabled

Attributes.Description: Ensure EBS volumes have encryption enabled
Attributes.RemediationProcedure: Enable encryption when creating EBS volumes
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if EBS volumes are encrypted

Requirements.Description: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 to port 22

Attributes.Description: Ensure no security groups allow unrestricted SSH access
Attributes.RationaleStatement: Open SSH access is a security risk
Attributes.ImpactStatement: Attackers can access instances via SSH
Attributes.RemediationProcedure: Restrict SSH access to specific IPs
Attributes.AuditProcedure: Check if security groups allow SSH from 0.0.0.0/0
